the prices are outrageous these days You can't afford it Absolutely Absolutely Yeah Tell me more I mean maybe just like the assistance programs you know with the EBT and just gas prices are crazy just food you know unaffordable Just everything about today's prices you know the economy is just terrible Absolutely Absolutely So I'd love to pass those concerns along to Sherrod Brown's office OK And
